meta.title: Remediation Tasks
meta.desc: Open remediation tasks for agent owners. Tracks actions generated from eval failures — the collaboration bridge between Compliance Admins and Agent Owners.

sqlite.query: SELECT agent_name as agent, owner, category, action, status, created_date, regulation FROM remediation_tasks WHERE status != 'closed' ORDER BY CASE status WHEN 'open' THEN 0 WHEN 'in_progress' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, created_date DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN status='open' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as open_tasks, SUM(CASE WHEN status='in_progress' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as in_progress, COUNT(DISTINCT agent_name) as affected_agents, COUNT(DISTINCT owner) as owners_involved FROM remediation_tasks WHERE status != 'closed'

compute.expr: '**' & $string(fetched_sources.task_stats[0].total) & '** active tasks across **' & $string(fetched_sources.task_stats[0].affected_agents) & '** agents — **' & $string(fetched_sources.task_stats[0].open_tasks) & '** open, **' & $string(fetched_sources.task_stats[0].in_progress) & '** in progress. **' & $string(fetched_sources.task_stats[0].owners_involved) & '** owners involved.'
